subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is a noble lady of exalted lineage, a distinguished one among the tribes, a handmaiden among Thy handmaidens, and one assured in faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی هذه کریمه العقائل و عقیله القبائل و امة من امائک و رقیقه من الموقنات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the departed, @love of God
